name: Zcash
description: Zcash is a privacy-preserving cryptocurrency that uses zero-knowledge proofs (zk-SNARKs) to enable shielded transactions. It provides JSON-RPC APIs via zcashd and zebrad for wallet operations, shielded transaction management, blockchain data access, and network interaction.

offers.description: Open-source privacy-preserving cryptocurrency with JSON-RPC and gRPC APIs for integration

hasPart.name: Zcash JSON-RPC API (zcashd)
hasPart.description: The primary JSON-RPC interface exposed by zcashd, the original Zcash full node. Backwards compatible with Bitcoin Core 0.11.2 with Zcash-specific extensions for shielded address management and private transactions.

hasPart.name: Zcash Payment API (z_ methods)
hasPart.description: The Zcash-specific extension to the JSON-RPC interface that enables shielded (private) transaction operations using zero-knowledge proofs. Includes methods for managing shielded addresses, sending private transactions with encrypted memos, and key management for the Sapling and Orchard shielded pools.

hasPart.name: Lightwalletd gRPC API
hasPart.description: A bandwidth-efficient gRPC service that provides a compact block streaming interface to the Zcash blockchain, enabling lightweight mobile and web wallet clients to sync shielded transactions without downloading the full blockchain.

hasPart.name: Zebra JSON-RPC API
hasPart.description: The JSON-RPC API provided by zebrad, the Zcash Foundation's independent Zcash full node implementation written in Rust. Designed to be a drop-in replacement for zcashd's RPC interface.
